<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="fr" class="dark">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>K3RN.LABS — Workspace Final Design</title>
    <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Inter:wght@300;400;500;600;700;800&family=JetBrains+Mono:wght@400;500&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
    <style>
        /* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
           K3RN.LABS CANONICAL DESIGN TOKENS
           ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */
        :root {
            --bg-primary: #000000;
            --bg-secondary: #0F0F0F;
            --bg-card: #1A1A1A;
            --bg-card-hover: #22242B;
            --surface-1: #2F323A;
            --surface-2: #5D5C5B;
            --border-subtle: rgba(255,255,255,0.05);
            --border-default: rgba(255,255,255,0.1);
            --border-strong: rgba(255,255,255,0.2);
            --text-primary: #FAFAFA;
            --text-secondary: #A1A1AA;
            --text-muted: #71717A;
            --brand-primary: #F75105;
            --brand-secondary: #F78E21;
            --shadow-glow: 0 0 30px rgba(247,81,5,0.3);
            --shadow-soft: 0 0 15px rgba(247,81,5,0.15);
            --radius-md: 8px;
            --radius-lg: 12px;
            --radius-xl: 16px;
            --radius-2xl: 24px;
            --radius-full: 9999px;
            --space-1: 4px; --space-2: 8px; --space-3: 12px; --space-4: 16px;
            --space-6: 24px; --space-8: 32px; --space-12: 48px; --space-16: 64px;
            --color-go: #22C55E; --color-explore: #F59E0B; --color-park: #6B7280; --color-kill: #EF4444;
        }
        * { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; }
        body {
            font-family: 'Inter', -apple-system, sans-serif;
            background: var(--bg-primary);
            color: var(--text-secondary);
            -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;
            overflow-x: hidden;
        }
        ::selection { background: rgba(247,81,5,0.3); color: white; }

        /* ═══════ HEADER ═══════ */
        .header {
            position: sticky; top: 0; z-index: 50;
            border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-subtle);
            background: rgba(0,0,0,0.92);
            backdrop-filter: blur(24px);
            -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(24px);
        }
        .header-inner {
            max-width: 1400px; margin: 0 auto;
            display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between;
            height: 64px; padding: 0 var(--space-8);
        }
        .header-left { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: var(--space-6); }
        .logo {
            width: 32px; height: 32px; background: var(--brand-primary);
            border-radius: 8px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
            font-weight: 800; font-size: 14px; color: white;
            transition: transform 0.5s ease;
        }
        .logo:hover { transform: rotate(180deg); }
        .divider { width: 1px; height: 20px; background: var(--border-default); }
        .nav-links { display: flex; gap: var(--space-6); }
        .nav-link {
            font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; text-transform: uppercase;
            letter-spacing: 0.1em; color: var(--text-secondary); text-decoration: none;
            padding: 21px 0; position: relative; transition: color 0.2s;
        }
        .nav-link:hover { color: var(--text-primary); }
        .nav-link.active { color: var(--brand-primary); }
        .nav-link.active::after {
            content: ''; position: absolute; bottom: 0; left: 0; right: 0;
            height: 2px; background: var(--brand-primary);
        }
        .header-right { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: var(--space-3); }
        .header-btn {
            padding: 6px 12px; font-size: 0.75rem; color: var(--text-muted);
            background: transparent; border: 1px solid var(--border-default);
            border-radius: var(--radius-md); cursor: pointer; font-family: inherit;
            transition: all 0.2s;
        }
        .header-btn:hover { color: var(--text-primary); border-color: var(--border-strong); background: var(--bg-card); }
        .avatar {
            width: 32px; height: 32px; border-radius: 50%;
            background: var(--surface-1); border: 1px solid var(--border-default);
            display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
            font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 600; color: var(--text-secondary);
        }

        /* ═══════ MAIN ═══════ */
        .main {
            max-width: 1400px; margin: 0 auto;
            padding: var(--space-12) var(--space-8) 160px;
        }

        /* ═══════ WELCOME HERO ═══════ */
        .welcome {
            margin-bottom: var(--space-12);
        }
        .welcome h1 {
            font-size: 2.5rem; font-weight: 300; color: var(--text-primary);
            letter-spacing: -0.02em; line-height: 1.1;
            margin-bottom: var(--space-2);
        }
        .welcome h1 span { color: var(--text-muted); font-weight: 300; }
        .welcome-sub {
            font-size: 1rem; color: var(--text-muted); font-weight: 400;
        }
        .welcome-sub strong { color: var(--text-secondary); font-weight: 500; }

        /* ═══════ GRID ═══════ */
        .projects-grid {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(300px, 1fr));
            gap: var(--space-6);
        }

        /* ═══════ PLATINUM CARD ═══════ */
        .p-card {
            background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(255,255,255,0.06) 0%, rgba(255,255,255,0.015) 100%);
            border-top: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.12);
            border-left: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06);
            border-right: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06);
            border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.4);
            border-radius: var(--radius-2xl);
            overflow: hidden;
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: all 0.3s ease;
            position: relative;
        }
        .p-card:hover {
            background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(255,255,255,0.09) 0%, rgba(255,255,255,0.03) 100%);
            border-top-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.25);
            transform: translateY(-3px);
            box-shadow: 0 12px 40px rgba(0,0,0,0.5);
        }

        /* Color accent */
        .p-card .accent { position: absolute; top: 0; left: 0; right: 0; height: 3px; }

        /* Card inner */
        .p-card-body { padding: var(--space-8); display: flex; flex-direction: column; min-height: 280px; }

        /* Card header row */
        .p-card-head { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: flex-start; margin-bottom: var(--space-4); }
        .p-card-head .folder-icon {
            width: 40px; height: 40px; border-radius: var(--radius-lg);
            background: var(--bg-card-hover); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
        }
        .p-card-head .folder-icon svg { width: 18px; height: 18px; color: var(--text-muted); }
        .p-card-score {
            text-align: right;
        }
        .p-card-score .val {
            font-size: 1.75rem; font-weight: 300; color: var(--text-primary);
            font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; line-height: 1;
        }
        .p-card-score .val.dim { color: var(--text-muted); }
        .p-card-score .unit { font-size: 0.75rem; color: var(--text-muted); margin-left: 1px; }

        /* Card body text */
        .p-card-title {
            font-size: 1.25rem; font-weight: 600; color: var(--text-primary);
            line-height: 1.25; margin-bottom: var(--space-2);
            display: -webkit-box; -webkit-line-clamp: 2; -webkit-box-orient: vertical; overflow: hidden;
        }
        .p-card-desc {
            font-size: 0.875rem; color: var(--text-muted); line-height: 1.5;
            display: -webkit-box; -webkit-line-clamp: 2; -webkit-box-orient: vertical; overflow: hidden;
        }

        /* Card footer */
        .p-card-foot {
            margin-top: auto; padding-top: var(--space-4);
            border-top: 1px solid var(--border-subtle);
            display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center;
        }
        .p-card-date {
            font-size: 0.6875rem; font-weight: 500; color: var(--text-muted);
            text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.05em;
            display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px;
        }
        .p-card-date svg { width: 12px; height: 12px; }
        .p-card-foot-right { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: var(--space-2); }
        .p-card-arrow {
            opacity: 0; transition: all 0.3s;
            color: var(--text-secondary);
        }
        .p-card:hover .p-card-arrow { opacity: 1; }
        .p-card-arrow svg { width: 16px; height: 16px; }

        /* Settings gear on hover */
        .p-card-settings {
            position: absolute; top: 16px; right: 16px; z-index: 5;
            opacity: 0; transition: opacity 0.2s;
            width: 32px; height: 32px; border-radius: 50%;
            background: rgba(0,0,0,0.5); backdrop-filter: blur(8px);
            display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
            color: var(--text-muted); border: none; cursor: pointer;
        }
        .p-card-settings:hover { color: var(--text-primary); }
        .p-card:hover .p-card-settings { opacity: 1; }
        .p-card-settings svg { width: 14px; height: 14px; }

        /* Badge */
        .badge {
            display: inline-flex; align-items: center;
            padding: 3px 10px; border-radius: var(--radius-full);
            font-size: 0.625rem; font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase;
            letter-spacing: 0.08em; border: 1px solid;
        }
        .badge-go { background: rgba(34,197,94,0.1); color: #4ade80; border-color: rgba(34,197,94,0.2); }
        .badge-explore { background: rgba(245,158,11,0.1); color: #fbbf24; border-color: rgba(245,158,11,0.2); }
        .badge-park { background: rgba(107,114,128,0.1); color: #9ca3af; border-color: rgba(107,114,128,0.2); }
        .badge-kill { background: rgba(239,68,68,0.1); color: #f87171; border-color: rgba(239,68,68,0.2); }

        /* ═══════ NEW PROJECT CARD ═══════ */
        .new-card {
            background: var(--bg-card);
            border: 1px dashed var(--border-default);
            border-radius: var(--radius-2xl);
            min-height: 280px;
            display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
            gap: var(--space-4);
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: all 0.2s;
        }
        .new-card:hover {
            border-color: var(--border-strong);
            background: var(--bg-card-hover);
        }
        .new-card .plus-circle {
            width: 48px; height: 48px; border-radius: 50%;
            background: var(--bg-card-hover); border: 1px solid var(--border-default);
            display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
            transition: all 0.3s;
        }
        .new-card:hover .plus-circle {
            border-color: var(--border-strong);
        }
        .new-card .plus-circle svg { width: 20px; height: 20px; color: var(--text-muted); transition: color 0.2s; }
        .new-card:hover .plus-circle svg { color: var(--text-primary); }
        .new-card .new-label {
            font-size: 0.6875rem; font-weight: 700; color: var(--text-muted);
            text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.1em;
            transition: color 0.2s;
        }
        .new-card:hover .new-label { color: var(--text-secondary); }

        /* ═══════ PROJECT DETAIL OVERLAY ═══════ */
        .overlay-bg {
            position: fixed; inset: 0; z-index: 100;
            background: rgba(0,0,0,0.75);
            backdrop-filter: blur(8px);
            display: none; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
            padding: var(--space-8);
        }
        .overlay-bg.visible { display: flex; }
        .overlay-card {
            background: var(--bg-card);
            border: 1px solid var(--border-default);
            border-radius: var(--radius-2xl);
            max-width: 960px; width: 100%;
            max-height: 90vh; overflow-y: auto;
            position: relative;
            box-shadow: 0 40px 80px rgba(0,0,0,0.6);
            scrollbar-width: thin; scrollbar-color: var(--surface-1) transparent;
        }
        .overlay-card::-webkit-scrollbar { width: 4px; }
        .overlay-card::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb { background: var(--surface-1); border-radius: 999px; }
        .overlay-close {
            position: absolute; top: var(--space-6); right: var(--space-6);
            width: 36px; height: 36px; border-radius: 50%;
            background: var(--surface-1); border: none; color: var(--text-muted);
            cursor: pointer; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
            transition: all 0.2s; z-index: 10;
        }
        .overlay-close:hover { color: var(--text-primary); background: var(--bg-card-hover); }
        .overlay-close svg { width: 18px; height: 18px; }
        .overlay-inner { padding: var(--space-8); padding-top: var(--space-8); }

        /* Detail layout: 2-col */
        .detail-grid {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
            gap: var(--space-8);
        }

        /* Radar */
        .radar-wrap {
            background: var(--bg-secondary);
            border-radius: var(--radius-xl);
            padding: var(--space-6);
            display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
            position: relative;
            aspect-ratio: 1;
        }
        .radar-wrap svg { width: 100%; max-width: 320px; }
        .radar-badge { position: absolute; bottom: var(--space-4); left: var(--space-4); }

        /* Detail right col */
        .detail-right { display: flex; flex-direction: column; }
        .detail-right h2 {
            font-size: 1.5rem; font-weight: 600; color: var(--text-primary);
            line-height: 1.2; margin-bottom: var(--space-2);
        }
        .detail-right .desc {
            font-size: 0.9375rem; color: var(--text-secondary); font-weight: 300;
            line-height: 1.7; margin-bottom: var(--space-6);
        }
        .detail-metrics {
            display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: var(--space-3);
            margin-bottom: var(--space-6);
        }
        .metric-block {
            background: var(--bg-secondary); border: 1px solid var(--border-subtle);
            border-radius: var(--radius-xl); padding: var(--space-4);
        }
        .metric-label {
            font-size: 0.625rem; font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase;
            letter-spacing: 0.1em; color: var(--text-muted); margin-bottom: var(--space-2);
        }
        .metric-val {
            font-size: 2rem; font-weight: 300; color: var(--text-primary);
            font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; line-height: 1;
        }
        .metric-val .u { font-size: 0.875rem; color: var(--text-muted); }

        .separator {
            height: 1px; background: var(--border-subtle); margin: var(--space-6) 0;
        }
        .section-label {
            font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase;
            letter-spacing: 0.1em; color: var(--brand-primary); margin-bottom: var(--space-4);
        }

        /* Axis bars */
        .axis-row {
            display: flex; align-items: center; gap: var(--space-3);
            margin-bottom: var(--space-3);
        }
        .axis-lbl { width: 130px; font-size: 0.8125rem; font-weight: 500; color: var(--text-secondary); flex-shrink: 0; }
        .axis-track { flex: 1; height: 5px; background: var(--surface-1); border-radius: 999px; overflow: hidden; }
        .axis-fill { height: 100%; border-radius: 999px; transition: width 0.8s ease-out; }
        .axis-val { font-size: 0.8125rem; font-weight: 500; color: var(--text-secondary); font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; min-width: 36px; text-align: right; }

        /* Synthesis */
        .synthesis {
            font-size: 0.9375rem; font-weight: 300; color: var(--text-secondary);
            line-height: 1.8; font-style: italic;
            border-left: 2px solid var(--border-default); padding-left: var(--space-6);
            margin: var(--space-3) 0;
        }

        /* Risks */
        .risk-list { list-style: none; }
        .risk-item {
            display: flex; align-items: flex-start; gap: var(--space-3);
            padding: var(--space-2) 0; font-size: 0.875rem;
            color: var(--text-secondary); line-height: 1.5;
        }
        .risk-dot {
            width: 6px; height: 6px; border-radius: 50%;
            background: var(--color-kill); margin-top: 7px;
            flex-shrink: 0; opacity: 0.7;
        }

        /* Buttons */
        .btn-row { display: flex; gap: var(--space-3); margin-top: var(--space-6); }
        .btn-primary {
            display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: var(--space-2);
            padding: var(--space-3) var(--space-6);
            background: var(--brand-primary); color: white; border: none;
            border-radius: var(--radius-md); font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600;
            font-family: inherit; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.2s;
        }
        .btn-primary:hover { background: var(--brand-secondary); box-shadow: var(--shadow-glow); transform: translateY(-1px); }
        .btn-secondary {
            display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: var(--space-2);
            padding: var(--space-3) var(--space-6);
            background: transparent; color: var(--text-primary);
            border: 1px solid var(--border-default);
            border-radius: var(--radius-md); font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500;
            font-family: inherit; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.2s;
        }
        .btn-secondary:hover { background: var(--bg-card); border-color: var(--border-strong); }

        /* ═══════ FLOATING DOCK ═══════ */
        .dock {
            position: fixed; bottom: 32px; left: 50%; transform: translateX(-50%); z-index: 60;
            display: flex; align-items: center; gap: var(--space-3);
            padding: 8px; border-radius: var(--radius-2xl);
            background: rgba(26,26,26,0.85);
            backdrop-filter: blur(24px); -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(24px);
            border: 1px solid var(--border-default);
            box-shadow: 0 20px 60px rgba(0,0,0,0.5);
        }
        .dock-group {
            display: flex; padding: 4px;
            background: var(--bg-secondary); border-radius: var(--radius-lg);
            border: 1px solid var(--border-subtle);
        }
        .dock-btn {
            width: 40px; height: 40px; border-radius: var(--radius-lg);
            display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
            background: transparent; border: none; cursor: pointer;
            color: var(--text-muted); transition: all 0.2s;
            font-family: inherit;
        }
        .dock-btn:hover { color: var(--text-primary); }
        .dock-btn.active { background: var(--border-default); color: var(--text-primary); }
        .dock-btn svg { width: 18px; height: 18px; }
        .dock-sep { width: 1px; height: 32px; background: var(--border-default); }

        /* Dock filters */
        .dock-filters { display: flex; gap: 2px; }
        .dock-filter {
            padding: 8px 14px; border-radius: var(--radius-lg);
            font-size: 0.625rem; font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase;
            letter-spacing: 0.08em; border: 1px solid transparent;
            background: transparent; color: var(--text-muted);
            cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.2s; font-family: inherit;
        }
        .dock-filter:hover { color: var(--text-secondary); background: var(--bg-secondary); }
        .dock-filter.f-active-all { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.08); color: var(--text-primary); border-color: var(--border-strong); }
        .dock-filter.f-active-go { background: rgba(34,197,94,0.1); color: #4ade80; border-color: rgba(34,197,94,0.2); }
        .dock-filter.f-active-explore { background: rgba(245,158,11,0.1); color: #fbbf24; border-color: rgba(245,158,11,0.2); }
        .dock-filter.f-active-park { background: rgba(107,114,128,0.1); color: #9ca3af; border-color: rgba(107,114,128,0.2); }
        .dock-filter.f-active-kill { background: rgba(239,68,68,0.1); color: #f87171; border-color: rgba(239,68,68,0.2); }

        /* Dock search */
        .dock-search-area { display: flex; align-items: center; position: relative; }
        .dock-search-input {
            width: 0; opacity: 0; height: 40px;
            background: var(--bg-secondary); border: none; border-radius: var(--radius-lg);
            color: var(--text-primary); font-family: inherit; font-size: 0.8125rem;
            padding: 0 16px 0 40px; outline: none;
            transition: all 0.3s;
        }
        .dock-search-area.open .dock-search-input { width: 220px; opacity: 1; }
        .dock-search-area .dock-btn { position: absolute; left: 0; z-index: 2; }

        /* Dock CTA */
        .dock-cta {
            width: 48px; height: 48px; border-radius: var(--radius-lg);
            background: var(--brand-primary); border: none; cursor: pointer;
            display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
            color: white; transition: all 0.2s;
            box-shadow: var(--shadow-soft);
        }
        .dock-cta:hover { background: var(--brand-secondary); box-shadow: var(--shadow-glow); transform: translateY(-1px); }
        .dock-cta svg { width: 22px; height: 22px; }

        /* ═══════ MAQUETTE LABEL ═══════ */
        .label-tag {
            position: fixed; top: 20px; right: 20px; z-index: 200;
            background: var(--brand-primary); color: white;
            padding: 6px 16px; border-radius: var(--radius-full);
            font-size: 0.5625rem; font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase;
            letter-spacing: 0.12em; box-shadow: var(--shadow-glow);
        }

        /* ═══════ ANIMATIONS ═══════ */
        @keyframes fadeUp { from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(16px); } to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); } }
        @keyframes fadeIn { from { opacity: 0; } to { opacity: 1; } }
        .anim { animation: fadeUp 0.5s ease-out forwards; opacity: 0; }
        .d1 { animation-delay: 0.05s; } .d2 { animation-delay: 0.1s; }
        .d3 { animation-delay: 0.15s; } .d4 { animation-delay: 0.2s; }
        .d5 { animation-delay: 0.25s; } .d6 { animation-delay: 0.3s; }

        @media (max-width: 1024px) {
            .detail-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
            .projects-grid { grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(260px, 1fr)); }
        }
        @media (max-width: 768px) {
            .nav-links { display: none; }
            .main { padding: var(--space-6) var(--space-4) 160px; }
            .dock-filters { display: none; }
            .welcome h1 { font-size: 1.75rem; }
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body>

    <div class="label-tag">Design Final / Workspace</div>

    <!-- ═══════ HEADER ═══════ -->
    <header class="header">
        <div class="header-inner">
            <div class="header-left">
                <div class="logo">K</div>
                <div class="divider"></div>
